case_title: FANYA E. YOUNG VS. PAMELA Y. PRICE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE', PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE LEMONS--RECEPTIONIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT PRICE, PAMELA Y. DBA PRICE & ASSOCIATES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED JUN-06-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, PAMELA Y. DBA PRICE & ASSOCIATES
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2013 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-15-2013 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA E.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-06-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER THROUGH SHERRI YOUNG, STATING SHE IS UNABLE TO COME TO COURT AS SHE IS IN THE HOSPITAL; ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA E.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YOUNG, FANYA E. AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, PAMELA Y. DBA PRICE & ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF YOUNG, FANYA E.
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT PRICE, PAMELA Y. DBA PRICE & ASSOCIATES
